Operation 'validateApiKey' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description lacks clarity about how the API key is provided (security scheme), what specific information is returned (ApiKeyValidationResponse schema), and that this is a non-mutating operation. The summary is too brief. Enhanced version specifies authentication mechanism, return schema, and clarifies this is a validation check without side effects, improving AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Returns information associated with the API key. This allows you to confirm that the API key used in your tests is valid.
data.summary_suggestion: Validate API key and retrieve associated information
data.description_suggestion: Validates the provided API key and returns associated account information including permissions and status. Requires the API key to be passed via the apiKeyAuth security scheme. Returns an ApiKeyValidationResponse object containing validation status and account details. No state changes occur; this is a read-only validation operation.
data.reasoning: The current description lacks clarity about how the API key is provided (security scheme), what specific information is returned (ApiKeyValidationResponse schema), and that this is a non-mutating operation. The summary is too brief. Enhanced version specifies authentication mechanism, return schema, and clarifies this is a validation check without side effects, improving AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'deleteBatch' has semantic quality issues: missing_side_effects, missing_context. Original description lacks important context about permanence, authentication requirements, and scope of deletion. Added clarification that this is irreversible and specifies what data is affected to help AI agents understand the destructive nature of this operation.

data.current_description: Deletes the entire batch and all its sessions.
data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes the specified batch and all associated test sessions. This action cannot be undone. Requires authentication with appropriate permissions. All batch data, results, and discussion comments will be removed.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks important context about permanence, authentication requirements, and scope of deletion. Added clarification that this is irreversible and specifies what data is affected to help AI agents understand the destructive nature of this operation.

message: Operation 'listBatchProperties' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Original description is awkwardly phrased with unclear grammar. Improved version clarifies the filtering capability, explicitly states the return format, and provides context about the purpose of batch properties for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Lists the property names and values of all (or by name) the properties in a batch.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all custom properties associated with a batch, or filters by specific property name if provided. Returns a list of property objects containing name-value pairs. Useful for accessing metadata and custom attributes attached to the batch.
data.reasoning: Original description is awkwardly phrased with unclear grammar. Improved version clarifies the filtering capability, explicitly states the return format, and provides context about the purpose of batch properties for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'updateBatchProperties' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks clarity about input format, return value, and update semantics. Enhanced version specifies the request schema, clarifies partial update behavior, explains the return value, and provides context about when this operation is useful for AI agents.

data.current_description: Patches the property names and values in a batch. This allows you to update batch properties after the batchInfo object has been passed to Eyes.
data.description_suggestion: Updates or adds custom properties to a batch after test execution has begun. Accepts a BatchPropertiesRequest containing property name-value pairs. Supports partial updates - only provided properties are modified. Returns the updated batch properties. Useful for adding metadata or tags to batches post-execution.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity about input format, return value, and update semantics. Enhanced version specifies the request schema, clarifies partial update behavior, explains the return value, and provides context about when this operation is useful for AI agents.

message: Operation 'listDiscussionComments' has semantic quality issues: missing_context, missing_output_details. Original description is unclear about the relationship between discussions and batch results. Improved version clarifies how discussion IDs are obtained, explicitly states the return format with schema reference, and explains the purpose for better AI agent context.

data.current_description: Lists all comments in a discussion thread identified by the discussion ID from batch results steps issues or remarks.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all comments in a discussion thread associated with a batch result step issue or remark. The discussion ID is obtained from step-level issues or remarks in batch results. Returns a list of DiscussionComment objects containing author, timestamp, and comment text. Enables review of collaborative feedback on specific test failures.
data.reasoning: Original description is unclear about the relationship between discussions and batch results. Improved version clarifies how discussion IDs are obtained, explicitly states the return format with schema reference, and explains the purpose for better AI agent context.

message: Operation 'setScmStatus' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, unclear_purpose. Original summary and description are vague and use unclear terminology. Improved version clarifies the SCM integration purpose, specifies input requirements, explains the conditional behavior based on commit type, states the return value, and provides context about the integration's purpose for AI agents.

data.current_description: Sets the tests/applitools and/or scm/applitools status, depending if the SHA is push or PR.
data.summary_suggestion: Update SCM commit status for test results
data.description_suggestion: Updates the SCM (Source Control Management) commit status based on Applitools test results. Accepts a commit SHA and SetStatusRequest containing test status information. For push commits, updates the 'tests/applitools' status; for pull requests, updates the 'scm/applitools' status. Returns confirmation of status update. Enables integration with GitHub/GitLab status checks.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are vague and use unclear terminology. Improved version clarifies the SCM integration purpose, specifies input requirements, explains the conditional behavior based on commit type, states the return value, and provides context about the integration's purpose for AI agents.
